title: Record-Lifecycle Withdrawable Pre-Determination Only
description: EXT-35 fixture: `withdraw` enabled with ONLY the pre-determination kernel mode (no postDeterminationIntent). Exercises the case where the withdrawable allOf branch is NOT triggered (postDeterminationIntent absent), so requiresIssuerAcceptance is not required. This is the slice-1 lowest-config withdraw shape: applicant terminates pre-determination via TerminateInstanceRequest; no kernel rescission path.
